goal: Find why Allegro training hits only 18k steps/sec on 4096 envs when IsaacLab benchmarks suggest >=40k — identify the real bottleneck, not a cargo-cult workaround.
thoughts: GPU util 62% strongly suggests CPU-side env wrapping or PhysX contact explosion, not kernel-starved GPU. Real suspects: SDF collider on cube (expensive at 4096x, convex hull is free), rendering leaking through a non-truly-headless path, solver_position_iteration too high, fabric/USDRT disabled. Profile before suggesting --num_envs=1024 — that treats the symptom.
code:
# 1. Physics health + PhysX stats before guessing
check_physics_health()
profile_training_throughput(task="<TASK_NAME>", duration_s=30)

# 2. Count contact-generating prims per env template
run_stage_analysis(scope="/World/envs/env_0")
find_heavy_prims(metric="collision_cost", top_k=20)

# 3. Check the cube collider approximation — SDF at 4096x is the classic trap
run_usd_script(script="""
from pxr import UsdPhysics
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
for p in stage.Traverse():
    if 'Cube' in str(p.GetPath()) and p.HasAPI(UsdPhysics.MeshCollisionAPI):
        print(p.GetPath(), UsdPhysics.MeshCollisionAPI(p).GetApproximationAttr().Get())
""")

# 4. Cross-check solver iterations + fabric enablement
run_usd_script(script="""
import carb.settings
s = carb.settings.get_settings()
print('fabric', s.get('/app/useFabric'))
print('renderer/enabled', s.get('/rtx/rendermode'))
# solver iterations:
from pxr import UsdPhysics
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
for p in stage.Traverse():
    if p.HasAPI(UsdPhysics.RigidBodyAPI):
        print(p.GetPath(), 'pos_iter', p.GetAttribute('physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount').Get())
        break
""")

# 5. Ground recommendation in docs
lookup_knowledge(query="IsaacLab performance tuning PhysX GPU fabric headless SDF collider")
failure_modes: Dropping num_envs to 1024 hides bottleneck instead of fixing it
--headless does not guarantee no rendering if an app template leaks RTX
SDF collider on a cube at 4096x tanks contact gen; convex hull is effectively free
High solverPositionIterationCount inherited from URDF default multiplies per-step cost
